note: AI Image Alt Text adds an AI 'Generate' button to image widgets and calls AI Core to write alt text. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts an agent would otherwise read source for; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site, which contrib module do I need in order to auto-generate image alt text with AI, and what does it depend on to actually talk to an AI model?
evals.expected_output: The AI Image Alt Text (ai_image_alt_text) module; it depends on core 'image' and on the AI / AI Core module (drupal/ai), which supplies the actual AI provider.

evals.prompt: Which AI Core operation type does the AI Image Alt Text module use to generate alt text from an image?
evals.expected_output: It uses AI Core's chat operation with a vision-capable model — it resolves the default provider for the 'chat_with_image_vision' operation type and sends a ChatInput carrying the image as an ImageFile.

evals.prompt: How does AI Image Alt Text expose alt-text generation to editors, and what controls whether the button shows up on an image field?
evals.expected_output: A 'Generate with AI' button is injected into image field widgets via hook_field_widget_single_element_form_alter. It appears only when the field has alt text enabled, the user has the 'generate ai alt tags' permission, an image is uploaded, and a working AI provider is configured.

evals.prompt: Which permission gates who can trigger AI alt-text generation in the ai_image_alt_text module?
evals.expected_output: The 'generate ai alt tags' permission gates both the button and the generate route.

evals.prompt: Where do I configure the AI Image Alt Text module, and what are the main settings (prompt, model, image preprocessing, autogenerate)?
evals.expected_output: At /admin/config/ai/ai_image_alt_text (route ai_image_alt_text.settings_form, config ai_image_alt_text.settings). Keys: prompt (Twig, tokens {{ entity_lang_name }} and {{ filename }}), image_style (default ai_image_alt_text, downscales before sending), ai_model (empty = site default chat_with_image_vision model), autogenerate, hide_button.

evals.prompt: Can AI Image Alt Text generate alt text in the content's language rather than always English, and how?
evals.expected_output: Yes. The content entity's language is passed to the generate route (lang_code) and rendered into the prompt via the {{ entity_lang_name }} Twig token, so the model responds in that language.

evals.prompt: If I don't pick a specific model in AI Image Alt Text's settings, how does it decide which AI provider/model to use?
evals.expected_output: The ProviderHelper (ai_image_alt_text.provider service) falls back to AI Core's default provider for the 'chat_with_image_vision' operation type via getDefaultProviderForOperationType(); if none is set no button/generation is available.

evals.prompt: Which submodule of AI Image Alt Text lets me fill in missing alt text for many images at once?
evals.expected_output: The ai_image_bulk_alt_text submodule adds a bulk 'Bulk Generate Alt Text with AI' form listing image fields missing alt text so you can generate and save them en masse.
